title: Voltage Divider + PWM LED
description: A resistive divider halves 5V onto A0; firmware reads it and dims an LED with PWM.

title: Analog Primitives
description: An explicit voltage source and current load with a current assertion — the smallest analog test.

title: STM32 Blue Pill
description: A minimal STM32F103 (Blue Pill) on a clean 3.3V rail with a PlatformIO firmware target.

title: ESP32 Battery Sensor
description: Battery-powered ESP32-C3 node with an LDO rail and an ADC battery-voltage divider.

title: Mixed-Signal Switch
description: An ESP32-C3 toggles a MOSFET to drive a load and senses the switched voltage back.

title: Missing Ground
description: The MCU has no ground net, so current has no return path. Repair should add one.

title: I2C Without Pull-ups
description: SDA and SCL float — the bus needs pull-up resistors to the 3V3 rail.

title: Invalid Pin Function
description: A GPIO is assigned an I2C function it cannot provide on that pin.

title: Bad ADC Divider
description: The divider ratio drives the ADC node outside the asserted 1.02-1.06V band.

title: Overloaded 3V3 Rail
description: A 700mA load exceeds the LDO's 250mA limit, so the 3V3 rail sags out of spec.
